mapper.sql: i.oom_id, i.item_no, i.item_nm, i.expctd_val, i.rprtd_val, i.dvtn_rate, i.judg_cd, i.rmrk, i.use_bgng_dt, i.use_end_dt, i.frst_reg_dt, i.frst_reg_user_id, i.last_chg_dt, i.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_oom_check_item i WHERE i.oom_id = #{oomId} AND NOW() BETWEEN i.use_bgng_dt AND i.use_end_dt ORDER BY i.item_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_oom_check_item (oom_id, item_no, item_nm, expctd_val, rprtd_val, dvtn_rate, judg_cd, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{oomId}, #{itemNo}, #{itemNm}, #{expctdVal}, #{rprtdVal}, #{dvtnRate}, #{judgCd}, #{rmrk}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_oom_check_item SET item_nm = #{itemNm}, expctd_val = #{expctdVal}, rprtd_val = #{rprtdVal}, dvtn_rate = #{dvtnRate}, judg_cd = #{judgCd}, rmrk = #{rmrk}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND item_no = #{itemNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_oom_check_item SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE oom_id = #{oomId} AND item_no BETWEEN 1 AND 18 AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
